description: SWG-style action RPG. Players spend Learning Points (LP) to unlock skill boxes within class trees. Enough boxes in a prereq class unlocks the next tier class. Stat bonuses from boxes are earned on learn and lost on unlearn.

files.classes.json: 32 classes (base→advanced→master). FK: prereq_class links to name in this file.
files.species.json: 6 playable sub-races across 3 beings (Elf/Human/Beast). FK: banned_classes links to class names.
files.skill_boxes.json: 576 skill boxes. FK: class_id→classes.id. stat_bonuses is a nested object. lp_cost=LP to learn, sp_earned=SP gained (used for combat level calc).
files.class_promotion_rules.json: 28 promotion paths. boxes_required is a list of skill_box IDs that must be learned. FK: unlocks_class_id→classes.id.
files.skills.json: Individual skills. FK: skill_box_id→skill_boxes.id. Most names TBD (placeholders present).
files.weapon_types.json: 32 weapon categories with EXP pools and certificate requirements.
files.weapons.json: 32 starter weapons (one per weapon type). stat_bonuses nested. FK: type→weapon_types.type.
files.gear_types.json: Gear slot definitions (Head, Chest, Boots, etc).
files.gear_sets.json: Named gear sets with bonus/curse stat pairs.
files.stats.json: Stat reference. Use by_abbreviation dict for fast lookup.
files.combat_level_formula.json: Formula constants: combat_level = floor(total_sp_earned / sp_per_combat_level) + base_combat_level.

key_rules: LP (Learning Points) = currency spent to unlock skill boxes.
SP (earned) = points credited per box unlocked, used to calculate combat level.
Combat level = floor(total SP earned / 25) + 1, capped at 150.
Unlearning a box refunds LP and removes its stat bonuses and skills.
Weapons without a license operate at 70% effectiveness.
Stat bonuses NOT yet balanced — treat as placeholder values.
Promotion branch requirements in class_promotion_rules.json are player-defined.
